manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X
X X ▢ ▢ X
X ▢ X ▢ X
X ▢ ▢ X X
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X

message.content: .DESCRIPTION: A 5x5 grid. Row 1: X, blank, blank, blank, X. Row 2: X, X, blank, blank, X. Row 3: X, blank, X, blank, X. Row 4: X, blank, blank, X, X. Row 5: X, blank, blank, blank, X.
message.reasoning: We need to respond with description only, starting with "DESCRIPTION:", then description of the grid. No extra. Provide short description. Should comply

reasoning_details.text: We need to respond with description only, starting with "DESCRIPTION:", then description of the grid. No extra. Provide short description. Should comply
